document_name: AI Engineer Assignment_ Build an Enterprise Knowledge Assistant (1).pdf
document_path: data\raw\AI Engineer Assignment_ Build an Enterprise Knowledge Assistant (1).pdf
text:
AI Engineer Assignment: Build an 
Enterprise Knowledge Assistant 
Overview 
Your task is to design and build an Enterprise Knowledge Assistant that can 
answer questions from a collection of internal documents. 
The goal is to build a practical AI application that demonstrates your ability to 
design, implement, and evaluate a production-oriented Retrieval Augmented 
Generation (RAG) system. 
The solution should allow employees to ask questions in natural language and 
receive accurate answers based on the provided knowledge base. 
 
Business Scenario 
A company has hundreds of internal documents including: 
● Product documentation 
● HR policies 
● Technical guides 
● Customer FAQs 
● Process documents 
● Compliance guidelines

text:
● Product documentation 
● HR policies 
● Technical guides 
● Customer FAQs 
● Process documents 
● Compliance guidelines 
Employees currently spend significant time searching these documents manually. 
Your task is to build an AI assistant that can: 
● Understand employee questions 
● Retrieve relevant information from documents 
● Generate accurate answers 
● Provide references to the source information

text:
Objective 
Build a working AI-powered knowledge assistant with the following capabilities: 
1. Document ingestion 
2. Knowledge extraction and indexing 
3. Semantic search 
4. Context-aware answer generation 
5. Source citation 
6. User interaction interface 
 
Functional Requirements 
1. Document Processing 
The system should support ingestion of provided documents. 
The pipeline should handle: 
● Document loading 
● Text extraction 
● Chunking strategy 
● Metadata management 
● Embedding generation 
● Storage in a searchable index 
You should explain your design choices. 
 
2. Question Answering 
Users should be able to ask questions like: 
Example: 
Question: 
What is the employee leave policy? 
Expected Response:

document_name: AI Engineer Assignment_ Build an Enterprise Knowledge Assistant (1).pdf
document_path: data\raw\AI Engineer Assignment_ Build an Enterprise Knowledge Assistant (1).pdf
text:
Employees are eligible for 24 paid leaves annually. 
Source: 
● HR_Policy.pdf 
● Page 12 
The system should: 
● Retrieve relevant information 
● Generate a concise answer 
● Avoid hallucinating information 
● Mention when information is unavailable 
 
3. User Interface 
Build a simple interface for interaction. 
Acceptable options: 
● Web application 
● Chat interface 
● API endpoint 
● Streamlit application 
The interface should allow: 
● Entering questions 
● Viewing responses 
● Viewing source documents/references 
 
4. API (Optional but Preferred) 
Expose your solution through an API. 
Example: 
POST /ask 
Request: 
{ 
 "question": "What is the refund policy?"

{ 
 "answer": "Refunds are allowed within 30 days.", 
 "sources": [ 
 {

 } 
 ], 
 "confidence": 0.91 
} 
 
 
Technical Expectations 
You may use any technology stack. 
Suggested tools: 
Programming Language 
● Python preferred 
LLM 
Examples: 
● OpenAI models 
● Anthropic models 
● Llama models 
● Other open-source models 
Embeddings 
Examples: 
● OpenAI embeddings 
● Sentence Transformers

Vector Database 
Examples: 
● FAISS 
● ChromaDB 
● Pinecone 
● Weaviate 
● Other alternatives 
Frameworks 
Optional: 
● LangChain 
● LlamaIndex 
● Haystack 
 
Evaluation Criteria 
Your submission will be evaluated on: 
1. AI System Design (25%) 
We will evaluate: 
● RAG architecture 
● Retrieval strategy 
● Chunking approach 
● Embedding selection 
● Prompt design 
 
2. Answer Quality (25%) 
We will test: 
● Accuracy

● Conversation memory 
● Hybrid search (keyword + semantic) 
● Query rewriting

Submission Requirements 
Please submit: 
1. Source Code 
Git repository containing: 
● Application code 
● Configuration files 
● Requirements/dependencies 
● Sample data handling 
 
2. README Documentation 
Include: 
● How to run the application 
● Architecture diagram 
● Technical decisions 
● Known limitations 
 
3. Demo Video 
5-minute maximum video showing: 
● Application walkthrough

Video Submission Format:
 Please upload your demo video to either: 
● Google Drive (ensure link sharing permission is set to "Anyone with the 
link can view")
 OR 
● YouTube (Unlisted videos are acceptable) 
 
4. System Design Document 
1–2 pages covering: 
● High-level architecture 
● Data flow 
● Component explanation 
● Scalability considerations 
 
Time Limit 
You have 72 hours from receiving this assignment to submit your solution. 
The expected effort is approximately 12–20 hours. 
 
Important Notes 
● Focus on quality over complexity. 
● We value engineering judgment and clear explanations. 
● Using existing libraries is allowed. 
● Clearly mention any assumptions.
